subcodes.first_line: O Sons and Daughters of the Kingdom! Your letter arrived, and by its significance it was conspicuous that you are all approached
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء و بنات ملکوت نامه شما رسید و از معانی آن توجه تام بملکوت الله معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @naming of children; of individuals
